Answer: Here is the solution:
```python
def find_pairs(items):
    pairs = []
    for item in items:
        if item.has_color(item.get_color()):
            pairs.append((item.get_color(), item.get_color()))
    return pairs
items = [
    ("item-alpha-00", "item-beta-01"),
    ("item-gamma-02", "item-delta-03"),
    ("item-epsilon-04", "item-zeta-05"),
    ("item-eta-06", "item-theta-07"),
    ("item-iota-08", "item-kappa-09"),
    ("item-lambda-10", "item-mu-11"),
    ("item-nu-12", "item-pi-13"),
    ("item-xi-14", "item-omicron-14"),
    ("item-pi-15", "item-wine"),
    ("item-zeta-05", "item-eta-06"),
    ("item-theta-07", "item-iota-08"),
    ("item-kappa-09", "item-lambda-10"),
    ("item-lambda-10", "item-mu-11"),
    ("item-nu-12", "item-pi-13"),
    ("item-xi-14", "item-omicron-14"),
    ("item-pi-15", "item-wine"),
]
print(find_pairs(items))
```
